subcodes.first_line: O ye offspring of the Friend of God! That pure soul is a diadem of celestial gold and gleaming jewels from the divine ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء خلیل الهی آن جان پاک اکلیلی از ذهب ملکوتی و جواهر زواهر دریای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies
